note_text:
Subjective: Patient reports pain at Right lower extremity wound site, rates 4/10.
Objective: Wound assessment performed. Arterial arterial Right lower extremity measures 2.8 cm x 1.7 cm x 0.6 cm.
  Wound bed: 32% slough, 68% granulation tissue. Periwound: intact.
  Drainage: light. Odor: present, foul.
Assessment: Arterial arterial Right lower extremity — improving.
Plan: Nutritional consult ordered. Debridement consult ordered.
